results.description: api/ layer must not contain `pub struct` outside designated struct homes — flat layout: api/error/, api/types/; domain-grouped layout: api/<domain>/errors/, api/<domain>/types/

violations.message: 'BearerEgressConfig' at line 30 — pub struct in api/main\src\api\vo\bearer_egress_config.rs is outside designated struct homes (api/types/ or api/{theme}/types/)
violations.fix_hint: Move the struct to core/ and expose it behind an api/ trait; to api/error/ or api/<domain>/errors/ if it is an error type; or to api/types/ or api/<domain>/types/ if it is a value object
